whyItMatters: 🚀I'm excited to share that I will be joining Meta Superintelligence Labs (MSL) as Vice President of AI Research, together with many members of the Virtue AI team. I will help shape Meta's AI safety and AI security efforts, advancing the safety and security of frontier AI models and agentic AI systems that will serve billions of people and organizations aro…
